## Findings

**Root cause:** Claude Code updates the Discord plugin from the official upstream marketplace every time it starts (via `--channels plugin:discord@claude-plugins-official`). This overwrites the cache path (`~/.claude/plugins/cache/claude-plugins-official/discord/0.0.4/`) and the marketplaces path (`~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/.../discord/`) with the vanilla upstream code, which lacks voice support.

**Why the old sync didn't work:...(truncated)
